name: moviepy
description: Python video composition with moviepy 2.x — overlaying deterministic text on AI-generated video (LTX-2, SadTalker), compositing clips, single-file build.py video projects. Use when adding labels/captions/lower-thirds to LTX-2 or SadTalker outputs, building short ad-style spots in pure Python without Remotion, or doing programmatic video composition. Triggers include text overlay on video, label LTX-2 clip, caption SadTalker output, lower third, build.py video, moviepy, Python video composition,
author: digitalsamba
summary_zh: 这是一个用纯Python代码合成视频的工具，专门解决给AI生成视频加字幕或标题的痛点。适合需要批量叠加文字、拼接片段，或通过写代码自动化制作短视频广告的场景。
